I now have the full vacation plans. Let me create a comprehensive packing list based on the Hawaii itinerary. Here's what I'll do:

args.content:
Hawaii Packing List
Based on Emma Johnson's Vacation Itinerary (June 10–20, 2024)

============================================================

CLOTHING & FOOTWEAR
  - Swimwear (multiple sets for beach days)
  - Casual outfits (shorts, t-shirts, sundresses)
  - Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
  - Hiking gear (moisture-wicking shirts, hiking shorts/pants)
  - Casual evening wear (for the Luau at Polynesian Cultural Center)
  - Comfortable walking shoes (for Pearl Harbor & shopping)
  - Hiking boots or trail shoes (for Diamond Head)
  - Flip flops / sandals
  - Water shoes (for kayaking at Kailua Beach)

BEACH & WATER GEAR
  - Sunscreen (reef-safe, high SPF)
  - Sunglasses
  - Beach hat or cap
  - Beach towel (quick-dry)
  - Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins — if not renting at Hanauma Bay)
  - Waterproof bag / dry bag
  - Rash guard or swim shirt

TOILETRIES & HEALTH
  - Aloe vera / after-sun lotion
  - Insect repellent
  - Basic first-aid kit (band-aids, antiseptic)
  - Motion sickness tablets (for road trips / boat outings)
  - Prescription medications
  - Lip balm with SPF
  - Travel-size toiletries (shampoo, conditioner, body wash)

TRAVEL ESSENTIALS
  - Travel documents (passport/ID, flight tickets, hotel reservations)
  - Wallet, credit cards, and some cash
  - Phone and charger
  - Portable power bank
  - Camera (with extra memory cards & charger)
  - Reusable water bottle (stay hydrated!)
  - Snacks for the road trip to the North Shore
  - Daypack / small backpack
  - Guidebook or map of Oahu

ACTIVITY-SPECIFIC
  - Shopping: foldable tote bag (Ala Moana Center)
  - Spa day: comfortable lounge wear
  - Kayaking: quick-dry shorts, secure waterproof phone pouch
  - Pearl Harbor: respectful attire (no swimwear; covered shoulders recommended)

============================================================
Have a wonderful trip to Hawaii! 🌺
